title: Mt. Lemmon Control Road — Full Run
description: Complete footage from our October climb up the Control Road (FR 38), including the Stairsteps crux and overnight camp at 8,200 ft.

title: Apache Trail Full Drive — Fish Creek Hill to Canyon Lake
description: One camera, no commentary. Raw driving footage of the Apache Trail's most dramatic section — the Fish Creek Hill cliff descent and the run to Canyon Lake.

title: Mogollon Rim Traverse — 2 Days on the Edge
description: Timelapse and trail footage from our two-day rim run along FR 300, catching the September aspens and rim-edge sunsets.

title: Gear Talk: What's Actually in the Recovery Kit
description: A real-world breakdown of what we carry for self-recovery — kinetic rope, hi-lift, traction boards, and what's gotten the most actual use over 40+ trail days.
